conventiondeclaration.abbr: beinecke manuscript unit archival processing manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Sunday August 19, 2018 at 21:27
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.
beinecke.astle.xml converted for compliance with Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines with brbl-migrate-01.xsl (mr2007-08-13).
PUBLIC "-//Yale University::Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library//TEXT (US::CtYBR::::[ASTLE CORRESPONDENCE ])//EN" "astle.xml" converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).

did.unittitle: Astle correspondence

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The papers include correspondence mainly regarding Astle's work in the Record Office. There is also correspondence with James Adams about his work on grammar, with Charles Blagden about the Pompeiian excavations, and with Harriot Collinson about her husband's work (John Collinson's "The History and Antiquities of the County of Somerset"). Much of the correspondence is annotated in an unidentified hand.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of James Marshall and Marie-Louise Osborn.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Astle Correspondence is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Astle Correspondence. James Marshall and Marie-Louise Osborn Collection. Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This finding aid was produced from a previously existing card set in the Manuscripts Catalog, or from another inventory. All pertinent bibliographical information has been retained. If the collection also contains unlisted or unsorted material, this has been noted in the box-and-folder list.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This finding aid encompasses accessions of materials pertaining to Thomas Astle.

did.unittitle: Correspondence
Adams, James, 1737-1802. 3 ALS to Thomas Astle, Piccadilly

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Asks Astle to comment on his book. Includes copy of a song.

did.unittitle: Ailesbury, Thomas Bruce Brudenell- Bruce, 4th Earl of, 1729-1814. AL (3d person) to Thomas Astle, Hungerford

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Friendly note.

did.unittitle: Astle, Thomas, 1735-1803. Memorandum, holograph, on an examination of Parliament Rolls, [n.p.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reply to inquiry from Lord Chancellor.

did.unittitle: Aylesford, Heneage Finch, 4th Earl of, 1751-1812. ALS to Thomas Astle, Parkington

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Separately catalogued as Osborn Collection, Drawer 2, 2.91

did.unittitle: Barthelemy, J. ALS to Thomas Astle, Hyde Park

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Information on the condemnation of Joan of Arc. With Astle's reply.

did.unittitle: Blagden, Sir Charles, 1748-1820. Letter, extract, to [Thomas Astle], Naples

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On Pompeiian expeditions. Copied by Astle.

did.unittitle: Botetourt, Norborne Berkeley, 4th Baron, 1736-1770. ALS to Thomas Astle, [n.p.]
Brequigny, Louis George Oudard Fendrix de, 1714-1794. ALS (in French) to Thomas Astle, London

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On his work in the Records Office.

did.unittitle: Butt, John Martin, d. 1741. ALS to Thomas Astle, Oxford
Chamberlaine, F. ALS to Thomas Astle, Brompton

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On the Holbein portraits.

did.unittitle: Collinson, Harriot (Mrs. John Collinson). ALS to Thomas Astle, Bath

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Asks Astle's help in defending her late husband's reputation as a historian.

did.unittitle: Cowper, Henry, 1758-1840. 2 ALS to Thomas Astle, [n.p.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Relays instructions from the Lord Chancellor.

did.unittitle: Eliot, John. ALS to Thomas Astle, [n.p.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Describes what happened on the day he did not wear his own hat.

did.unittitle: Ferrers, Washington Shirley, 5th Earl, 1722-1778, Staunton Harold. ALS to Thomas Astle

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Desires information about land titles.

did.unittitle: Fraser, William. ALS to Thomas Astle, Cleveland Row

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Asks Astle to deposit papers in trunk. Footnote by Astle reads, "Mr Pitts Correspondence during the War, very private."

did.unittitle: Hargrave, Francis, 1741?-1821. ALS to Thomas Astle, Boswell Court

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inquires whether there once was a keeper of the records with the name Hennage.

did.unittitle: Howard, John Griffin, 4th Baron of, 1719-1797. ALS (3d person) to Thomas Astle, Burlington St.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Official business.

did.unittitle: Lemon, Robert, 1729-1813. 4 ALS to Thomas Astle, Tower

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Friendly and business correspondence.

did.unittitle: Liverpool, Charles Jenkinson, 1st Earl of, 1727-1808. AL (3d person) to Thomas Astle, Addiscombe Place

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: About Parliamentary records.

did.unittitle: Mackenzie, W. ALS to Thomas Astle, Burlington St.
Mayo, Joseph Deane Bourke, 3d Earl of, Abp. of Tuam, 1763-1794. AL (3d person) to Thomas Astle, New Burlington St.
Mellish, Charles. ALS to Thomas Astle, Grosvenor Place
Melville, Robert, 1723-1809. AL (fragment ) to the Earl of Buchan, North Frederick Street Court

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On antiquarian matters. Endorsed by Thomas Astle.

did.unittitle: Morin, P. ALS to Thomas Astle, St. James

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inquires about an agreement made between the English and French Commissaries, in April or May 1714.

did.unittitle: Northumberland, Hugh Percy, 4th Duke of, 1742-1817. AL (3d person) to Thomas Astle, North House

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sends thanks for his valuable present.

did.unittitle: Nugent, Robert Craggs Nugent, Earl, 1702-1788. ALS to Thomas Astle, [n.p.]
Ranelagh, Charles Wilkinson Jones, 4th Viscount, 1712-1797. ALS to Thomas Astle, Dublin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Requests a copy of the grant to the Earl of Ranelagh, his ancestor.

did.unittitle: Reeves, John. ALS to Thomas Astle, [n.p.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Requests information about silver coinage for Lord Liverpool.

did.unittitle: Rose, George, 1744-1816. 2 ALS to Thomas Astle, Great George St.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On business for the Record Office.

did.unittitle: Shaftesbury, Anthony Ashley Cooper, 4th Earl of, 1701-1771. 3 ALS to Thomas Astle, Dorchester

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Asks assistance in verifying his ancestry and excuses Astle from meeting of the "corps."

did.unittitle: Sharpe, Gregory, 1713-1771. ALS to Thomas Astle, St. Giles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Requests information on new importation duties.

did.unittitle: Stafford, Smyth. AL (3d person) to Thomas Astle, Downing St.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Thanks for assistance.

did.unittitle: Valltravers, Rodolph, b.1723. ALS to Thomas Astle, Hamburg

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Requests Astle vote for him in the appointment of an Assistant Librarian to the British Museum.

did.unittitle: Vernon, George Venables-Vernon, 2d Baron, 1735-1813. ALS to Thomas Astle, Sadbury

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Refers to an enclosed letter from his brother, the Bishop of Carlisle, but this letter is wanting.

did.unittitle: Wallis, John, 1714-1793. ALS to Thomas Astle, Simonburn

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports progress of his book.

did.unittitle: Walsby, John. ALS to Thomas Astle, [n.p.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Advises cure for rheumatism.

did.unittitle: Walsh, Mr. AL to Thomas Astle, [n.p.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerns some coins found at Colony Chapel, three miles from St. Albans.

did.unittitle: Walsingham, Thomas de Grey, 2d Baron, 1748-1818. ALS to Thomas Astle, Upper Harley St.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On records of the Board of Trade.

did.unittitle: Wappeler, William. ALS to Thomas Astle, Ghent
Watts, John. ALS to Thomas Astle, Beverly
